summary: Excellent soundboard recording of an underrated 1990 Kickerbocker run night, showcasing stellar energy and Brent Mydland’s magical keyboards.
review: Both reviewers rave about this show, calling it one of the best setlists of 1990 with “stellar energy” and a highlight on Brent’s magic. The remastered soundboard source is praised as crisp and possibly better than official releases, making the performance both sonically and musically outstanding.

ai_rating.rationale: Enthusiastic 5‑star reviews praise both the show’s energy/setlist and the high‑quality remastered soundboard, indicating an exceptional performance and recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Remastered soundboard; crisp, clear, and described as sounding as good or better than official releases.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as one of the strongest setlists of 1990 with seamless flow and high energy throughout the night.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland delivers magical keyboard work, highlighted by reviewers as a key highlight of the show.
